news.summary: The performance of Stable Diffusion 3.5 has been greatly enhanced by NVIDIA's TensorRT SDK, leading to a remarkable reduction of 40% in VRAM requirements. Additionally, the efficiency on RTX GPUs has doubled as a result of this improvement. This development showcases the significant impact of the NVIDIA TensorRT SDK on enhancing the performance of Stable Diffusion 3.5, making it more efficient and reducing the resources needed for operation.
news.headline: TensorRT by NVIDIA boosts Stable Diffusion 3.5 on RTX GPUs: VRAM cut by 40%, efficiency doubles. (More at source)

news.summary: A groundbreaking tool developed by NVIDIA, called RAPIDS-singlecell, is transforming research in single-cell biology by tackling challenges related to data size and analysis speed. This innovative tool utilizes GPU acceleration to handle billion-cell data sets, bringing a revolution in the field.
news.headline: RAPIDS-singlecell by NVIDIA transforms billion-cell data analysis in biology, accelerating research with GPU for faster insights.

news.summary: AI infrastructure expansion in Europe is set to be launched by Together AI in collaboration with Hypertec and 5C Group. This partnership aims to cater to the increasing demand for sovereign AI capabilities in the region. This strategic move is expected to significantly enhance the existing infrastructure and meet the needs of the market.
news.headline: AI company expands in Europe with new infrastructure and team development. Partners with Hypertec and 5C Group for significant growth.

news.summary: The digital asset platform Polygon has expanded its POL token to the Solana blockchain using Wormhole's Native Token Transfers (NTT) technology. This move aims to increase interoperability across multiple blockchains and provide users with access to Solana's vibrant ecosystem. The integration of POL token on Solana opens up new opportunities for transactions and DeFi activities across different chains, benefiting from Solana's high-speed and low-cost network.
news.headline: Polygon's POL incorporates Solana via Wormhole NTT, boosting multichain abilities and access. Read more for details.

news.summary: Character.AI has introduced a new framework aimed at evaluating AI models using effective writing principles, which aims to improve storytelling and interactive conversations. This innovation by Character.AI is set to revolutionize the way AI models are assessed in the industry. This novel approach is expected to significantly impact the development and deployment of AI technologies. For more information on this groundbreaking framework, visit the link provided.
news.headline: Character.AI reveals innovative approach to evaluate writing models using compelling principles, boosting storytelling. #AI #innovation

news.summary: The metric CAIR, which stands for Confidence in AI Results, is increasingly vital for the success of AI products. This metric impacts user adoption by guiding design choices that address the areas of risk, correction, and value. It plays a crucial role in determining the effectiveness and acceptance of AI products in the market.
news.headline: CAIR is key for AI success - manages risk, correction, and value, boosting user adoption. Key metric for product success.

news.summary: Ethereum has introduced its inaugural Season of Internships, presenting a chance for individuals to engage in paid, remote positions within its ecosystem. This initiative aims to nurture fresh talent and encourage contributions to the platform. This unique opportunity allows interns to be a part of the Ethereum community while gaining valuable experience.
news.headline: Ethereum offers paid remote internships to boost talent and contributions in its ecosystem. Apply now! #internships #Ethereum

news.summary: Explore the key elements of a contemporary open-source AI computing technology stack, with notable platforms such as Kubernetes, Ray, PyTorch, and vLLM, which are embraced by major corporations like Pinterest, Uber, and Roblox. Learn more about how these companies leverage these technologies for their operations.
news.headline: Discover the latest in Open Source AI Compute with Kubernetes, Ray, PyTorch and vLLM used by top companies.

news.summary: French electric utility company, EDF, has joined forces with technology giant NVIDIA to improve fluid dynamics simulations. The collaboration will leverage NVIDIA Nsight Profilers to boost performance and efficiency. This partnership aims to enhance simulation capabilities and drive innovation in the field.
news.headline: EDF partners with NVIDIA for optimized fluid dynamics simulations with Nsight Profilers, boosting performance.

news.summary: Learn how TogetherAI's data scientist agent, an open-source platform, streamlines intricate data processes with the ReAct framework and Code Interpreter. This technology boosts AI-driven data analysis by providing efficient solutions. By utilizing this innovative tool, users can easily manage large datasets and conduct complex analyses, significantly improving productivity. Experience the future of data science with TogetherAI.
news.headline: Discover TogetherAI's open-source data scientist agent, leveraging ReAct framework & Code Interpreter for seamless AI-driven data tasks.

news.summary: NVIDIA has partnered with MMseqs2 to improve protein sequence alignment by leveraging GPU acceleration. This collaboration is expected to bring notable progress in AI-driven drug discovery and protein design. The GPU-accelerated technology will enhance the speed and efficiency of aligning protein sequences, leading to potential breakthroughs in these fields. Scientists anticipate a substantial impact on research and development processes, with accelerated performance enhancing the precision and effectiveness of analyses. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in utilizing advanced technology to drive innovations in the scientific community.
news.headline: NVIDIA, MMseqs2 boost protein design with GPU acceleration, ensuring faster alignment and driving progress in AI drug discovery.

news.summary: Meta is venturing into its first significant minority investment in an external company as it seeks to keep pace with a burgeoning artificial intelligence market. This move comes as Meta faces stiff competition in the industry.
news.headline: Meta invests $14.3B in Scale AI to boost Superintelligence Lab, making its debut minority investment outside.

news.summary: Oklo Inc., an advanced nuclear technology company based in Santa Clara, California, has disclosed the pricing details for its underwritten public offering. The company is offering 6,666,667 shares of its Class A common stock, valued at $60.00 per share to the public. Additionally, Oklo has granted the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 1,000,000 additional shares. This move aims to raise funds for the company's operations and expansion plans.
news.headline: Oklo Inc. prices public offering of 6,666,667 shares of common stock at $60.00 per share ($400 million total). Underwriters have option for additional 1,000,000 shares.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Scale AI, Inc. revealed a notable investment from Meta Platforms, Inc. (Nasdaq: META), which values the company at more than $29 billion. This investment aims to bolster Scale's data solutions deployment with Meta. Alexandr Wang, Scale's founder, will also join Meta's AI division while retaining his current role at Scale. This move signifies a deepening partnership between the companies.
news.headline: Scale AI receives over $29 billion investment from Meta Platforms, expanding their partnership and founder Alexandr Wang moves to Meta.

news.summary: In Frisco, Texas, Blue Star Innovation Partners ("BSIP") and PSG have finalized the sale of PlayMetrics to Genstar Capital. BSIP, a growth equity investment firm, and PSG, a leading growth equity firm focused on software and technology-enabled services companies, completed the transaction. The announcement comes after multiple revisions to the original release issued on June 11, 2025. The deal marks a significant milestone, demonstrating the firms' commitment to innovation and strategic partnerships in the industry.
news.headline: Blue Star Innovation Partners and PSG sell PlayMetrics to Genstar Capital.(updated 6/11/25) Growth equity transaction.

news.summary: Long Beach, California, June 12, 2025 - The Augmented World Expo USA 2025 has come to a close, marking a significant milestone for the XR industry. This event, which is the largest of its kind globally, celebrated innovation and legacy within the realm of XR and spatial computing. The highlight of the expo was the announcement of the prestigious BEST IN SHOW award. This year's expo drew a record number of attendees and exhibitors, reinforcing its position as a key event in the industry.
news.headline: Augmented World Expo announces 2025 Auggie Award winners and Best in Show at event, marking a milestone in XR industry.

news.summary: In New York on June 12, 2025, Monport laser started the Monport Mid-Year Super Sale featuring exclusive discounts on top-tier CO2 laser and fiber laser engraving machines. The spotlight of the sale is on the latest Monport Mega Lite 70W desktop model.
news.headline: Monport laser launches Mid-Year Sale with discounts on CO2 and fiber laser machines. Key product: Monport Mega Lite 70W desktop.

news.summary: During the G7 Summit in Kananaskis, Alberta, the Friends of Science Society have advocated for world leaders to discard Net Zero and climate-aligned finance objectives. They reference Vaclav Smil's latest book, which argues the impracticality of achieving Net Zero. Retired energy economist, Robert Lyman, has published numerous reports challenging these goals.
news.headline: Friends of Science urge G7 leaders to drop Net Zero goals at Kananaskis Summit, citing Vaclav Smil's book on impossibility.

news.summary: Marelli Holdings Co. Ltd. has obtained temporary authorization to access a portion of $1.1 billion in debtor-in-possession financing, securing up to $519 million. Despite this development, all regular business operations are ongoing without disruption. Marelli, a worldwide technology collaborator, remains committed to maintaining its normal-course operations during this period.
news.headline: Marelli approved motions to access $519 million of $1.1 billion debtor-in-possession financing, ensuring operations continue.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Innovent Biologics, Inc., a leading biopharmaceutical company based in San Francisco and Suzhou, China, announced significant developments. Innovent, listed as HKEX: 01801, specializes in developing, manufacturing, and distributing top-notch medications for oncology, autoimmune, cardiovascular, and other medical conditions.
news.headline: Innovent will showcase R&D results at ADA's 85th Scientific Sessions. Headquarters are in San Francisco and Suzhou, China.日期: June 12, 2025.HKEX: 01801. Specializes in oncology, autoimmune, and cardiovascular medicines.

news.summary: Director Rudy Valdez, along with a host of producers, cast members, executives from New York Road Runners, Tribeca Studios, and New Balance, gathered at a high-profile red carpet event in New York. The event, which took place on June 12, 2025, saw a significant turnout with attendees gaining insights from New York Road Runners (NYRR), a renowned nonprofit organization that orchestrates 60 annual events targeted towards adults in New York City. The gathering was graced by various industry professionals and key figures, fostering a vibrant atmosphere for networking and collaboration.
news.headline: NYRR hosts screening of "Final Finishers" during Tribeca Festival. Director Rudy Valdez and executives attend.
